rationale: Confirmed US air strike killing the Tren de Aragua gang leader is a real action with domestic political resonance; Iran deal and Beirut remain rhetoric-level for US residents.

top_events.title: US kills leader of Venezuela's Tren de Aragua gang in air strike
top_events.summary: Confirmed US military strike eliminates the leader of a gang designated as a terrorist organization, a tangible domestic security action with political impact for US residents.

top_events.title: Trump condemns Israel's Beirut attack, says Iran deal still close
top_events.summary: Trump's Iran deal comments remain unconfirmed rhetoric; no signed agreement or confirmed policy change affecting US residents or oil markets.

top_events.title: Thousands protest as world leaders meet for G7 summit
top_events.summary: G7 summit protests are background political noise; no confirmed policy outcomes yet affecting US daily life.
